description: You are a marketing analyst. Perform a cohort retention analysis on the Online Retail dataset (/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/online_retail.csv) to evaluate user loyalty over time. Calculate monthly retention rates by identifying each customer's acquisition month and tracking their activity across subsequent months. The analysis should exclude records with missing customer IDs or non-positive quantities. Save the resulting calculation table, including columns for Cohort Month, Cohort Index, and Retention Rate, to /home/ga/RProjects/output/retention_rates.csv. Generate a heatmap visualization of the retention rates and save it to /home/ga/RProjects/output/retention_heatmap.png. Write the complete analysis script to /home/ga/RProjects/cohort_analysis.R.
